name: Curriculum Vitae
descs:
Turn End: allies with 7+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 1 [Agility] next turn.

If the ally has Gloom Affinity Skills, gain 2 [Agility] and 1 [ResultEnhancement] next turn instead.

Turn End: allies with 7+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2 [Agility] next turn.</style>

If the ally has Gloom Affinity Skills, gain <style="upgradeHighlight">3 [Agility]</style> and 1 [ResultEnhancement] next turn instead.

Turn End: allies with 7+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain <style="upgradeHighlight">3 [Agility] next turn.</style>

If the ally has Gloom Affinity Skills, gain <style="upgradeHighlight">4 [Agility]</style> and 1 [ResultEnhancement] next turn instead.
